headline: Oil Prices Ease As Iran Holds Fire, Trump Pursues Deal; S&P 500 Futures Bounce
summary: Oil prices pared gains early Monday after jumping amid strikes between Iran and Israel, after the latter targeted Hezbollah in Lebanon.  S&P 500 futures gained ground as President Donald Trump's efforts to restrain both countries and keep ceasefire negotiations on track seem to be working.  Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced the end of military operations vs. Israel but warned of "harsher and more devastating strikes" if Lebanon attacks resume.

headline: CME Group CEO Blasts Bitcoin Perpetual Futures, Warns of ‘2007’ Risk
summary: CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) Chairman and CEO Terry Duffy sharply criticized the Commodity Futures Trading Commission’s approval of a Bitcoin perpetual futures contract for Kalshi, saying the product does not fit his view of a futures contract and raises risks for retail investors. headline: Will Crypto Intrude on Financial Exchanges’ Business? The Panic is Premature.
summary: Perpetual futures tied to cryptocurrencies don’t spell perpetual risk for Intercontinental Exchange, Cboe, and CME.
